description: Fixed AgentField iframe positioning between Build Log and Foundry Result sections, and added accessibility attributes per architecture spec.

properties.summary: Moved AgentField section from before Build Log to after Build Log position; added title, id, and data-workflow-execution attributes to both iframe container and placeholder container.
codebase_learnings: Build detail sections follow order: Build Log → AgentField execution → Foundry result
Accessibility attributes (title, id, data-*) added to container elements
Partial Accept line used for conditional rendering logic in Blazor files

agent_retro.positioning: Large files harder to track all sections; using find and replace with context helps avoid errors
agent_retro.accessibility: Architecture doc specifies exact accessibility requirements - good to check there before implementation

title: CoderResult
